creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
We attempted an upgrade to 2.2.0 before and ran into problems, so it was 
reverted.

Please see the full explanation in PR 182077.

I also have no time to continue maintaining this port.  If someone else 
would like to take ownership and resolve the issues with 2.2.0, they are 
welcome to it.

     JB

On 3/23/14 7:20 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of science/minc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/187884 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/187884
>


-- 
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   Jason W. Bacon
   jwbacon@tds.net

   Circumstances don't make a man:
   They reveal him.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
